message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant RemoteServiceServlet as RemoteServiceServlet
participant HttpSessionCollector as HttpSessionCollector
participant SysLog as SysLog
participant Validation_User as Validation_User

RemoteServiceServlet->>RemoteServiceServlet: Data Request
RemoteServiceServlet->>HttpSessionCollector: Get Session ID_client
HttpSessionCollector-->>RemoteServiceServlet: Get Session by ID_client
HttpSessionCollector-->>RemoteServiceServlet: Session

note right of RemoteServiceServlet
Validation Tockens
True
end note

note right of RemoteServiceServlet
Validation Tockens
False
end note

note right of RemoteServiceServlet
Access success
end note

RemoteServiceServlet->>Validation_User: Access success

note right of RemoteServiceServlet
Validation Tockens
False
end note

note right of RemoteServiceServlet
Tocken Failure (Name, Time)
end note

RemoteServiceServlet->>SysLog: Tocken Failure (Name, Time)
SysLog-->>RemoteServiceServlet: Access denied

@enduml
